item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Clean Energy Permitting Reform
item.description:
👀 Clean Energy Permitting Reform

NEPA/FERC permitting reform 119th Congress: transmission-line federal authority · interconnection-queue reform · community-engagement standards. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 2 + Inflation Reduction Act Amendments. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
